examples.title: Basic local functions
examples.description: Define helper functions inside methods to encapsulate logic and reduce pollution of class scope.

examples.title: Local functions with recursion and closures
examples.description: Use local functions for recursive algorithms and to capture variables from the enclosing scope.

examples.title: Local async functions and iterators
examples.description: Combine local functions with async/await and yield to create powerful iterative and asynchronous patterns.

relatedFeatures.reason: Start with LINQ when you want an earlier building block for Local functions.
